whatWasImplemented: src/lib/stripe/client.ts — memoized Stripe SDK client. Reads STRIPE_SECRET_KEY plus optional STRIPE_API_HOST / STRIPE_API_PORT / STRIPE_API_PROTOCOL for stripe-mock routing in tests (in production those three are unset, so the SDK goes to api.stripe.com). Exports resetStripeClient() for test isolation.

src/app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts — POST handler. Auth-required (401 without session). Parses plan_id from JSON body (400 on missing, malformed JSON, or unknown plan). Looks up plans row by id; rejects 400 if stripe_price_id is NULL (plan not yet configured by create-stripe-prices script). Lazy-creates the Stripe customer and stores the id on profiles.stripe_customer_id; subsequent calls reuse it. Session includes client_reference_id=user.id so the webhook can correlate back even before subscription_id lands on the profile.
success_url and cancel_url pinned to NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL + /dashboard/billing with ?checkout=success|canceled query param so the billing page can render a toast after redirect.

src/__tests__/stripe-checkout.test.ts — 11 unit tests with mocked Stripe + Supabase: auth gate (401), plan validation (400 on missing/unknown/not-configured/malformed-JSON), happy path (200 + URL, correct line items, correct URLs, client_reference_id), lazy customer create vs reuse.

src/__tests__/stripe-checkout-integration.test.ts — 2 integration tests against live stripe-mock. Gated by STRIPE_API_HOST so they skip silently in CI until stripe-mock is wired up. Proves the stripeClient() wiring actually reaches stripe-mock end-to-end.
discoveredIssues: Stripe SDK v22 TypeScript types for Checkout.SessionCreateParams require a union-narrow on line_items price — trivially handled by TS inference since we pass a string literal. No hack needed.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 247 passed / 1 skipped / 34 files (+13 new — 11 unit + 2 stripe-mock integration).
